settings.hero_text: WRYDECO creates handcrafted natural solid wood furniture that lives between organic art, sculptural design, and luxury bespoke interiors.
settings.hero_image_alt: Sculptural solid wood dining table and handcrafted chair in a warm interior
settings.story_text:
Born from a passion for wood and form, WRYDECO was founded to create timeless pieces that celebrate the beauty of nature and the skill of human hands.

We work with solid, natural wood—never veneers—honoring the grain, texture, and character that make each piece truly one of a kind.
settings.story_image_alt: Sculptural wooden artwork displayed with a framed abstract print

settings.image_alt: Alex Nguyen carving an ornamental wood detail in his workshop
settings.name: Alex Nguyen
settings.bio: Alex blends traditional carving with a deep respect for natural materials to create sculptural, soulful pieces made to last.

settings.image_alt: Kiet Phac shaping solid wood by hand in the workshop
settings.name: Kiet Phac
settings.bio: With decades of workshop experience, Kiet brings meticulous attention to every curve, joint, and hand-finished surface.

settings.image_alt: Ngoc Vo standing among hand tools in the WRYDECO workshop
settings.name: Ngoc Vo
settings.bio: Ngoc ensures every piece balances beauty, function, and the natural character of the wood selected for your space.

settings.description: We use solid, natural wood sourced responsibly. Each slab is hand-selected for its grain, character, and integrity. Our makers shape, refine, and finish every detail by hand—creating heirloom-quality furniture meant to be cherished for generations.
settings.consultation_text: From custom sizing to bespoke designs, we're here to bring your vision to life.
settings.consultation_image_alt: Sculptural solid wood console styled with branches and warm natural objects
